supported_claims.statement: The case_001 docstring update on src/oida_code/operator_soak/aggregate.py preserves the aggregator behavior — rules 3 and 4 already short-circuited before rule 5 in the implementation, so spelling that out in the module docstring is a wording alignment rather than a contract change. The pytest evidence confirms tests/test_phase5_7_operator_soak.py still passes with the docstring change applied.

warnings: Pass 2 forward: the supported claim is intentionally scoped narrowly to the docstring-update / no-behavior-delta scope. The gateway does not assert anything about wider production correctness. Diagnostic only.
